ddls:
CREATE TABLE "wells" (
  "well_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well */,
  "well_name" TEXT /* Name of the well */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Location of the well */,
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Type of well */,
  "latitude" TEXT /* Geographical latitude of the well */,
  "longitude" TEXT /* Geographical longitude of the well */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("well_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_type_id FOREIGN KEY ("type_id") REFERENCES well_types ("type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_wells_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_types" (
  "type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well type */,
  "type_name" TEXT /* Name of the well type */,
  "sub_type" TEXT /* Sub-type of the well */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_performance" (
  "performance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each performance record */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date of data collection */,
  "time" TEXT /* Time of data collection */,
  "bopd" REAL /* Barrels of oil per day */,
  "bwpd" REAL /* Barrels of water per day */,
  "mmscfd" REAL /* Million standard cubic feet of gas per day */,
  "x" REAL /* Unknown parameter (assuming x is a performance metric) */,
  "well_status" TEXT /* Current status of the well */,
  "operator_id" INTEGER /* ID of the operator responsible for the well performance data */,
  "comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes related to the well performance data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("performance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_well_performance_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "city" TEXT /* City where the well is located */,
  "state" TEXT /* State where the well is located */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the well is located */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., operator, analyst, admin) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the well performance data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the well performance data was accessed */,
  "access_time" TEXT /* Time when the well performance data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_duration" INTEGER /* Duration of access in minutes */,
  "access_comments" TEXT /* Additional comments or notes related to the access logs */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each alert */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well with the issue */,
  "alert_date" TEXT /* Date when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_time" TEXT /* Time when the alert was triggered */,
  "alert_type" TEXT /* Type of alert (e.g., high pressure, low production) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the alert */,
  "alert_status" TEXT /* Status of the alert (e.g., active, resolved) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_alerts_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each well group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the well group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the well group */,
  "created_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who created the well group */,
  "created_date" TEXT /* Date when the well group was created */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "well_group_members" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well group */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "added_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who added the well to the group */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id", "well_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_validation" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data validation rule */,
  "well_id" INTEGER /* ID of the well */,
  "parameter" TEXT /* Parameter being validated (e.g., pressure, production rate) */,
  "min_value" REAL /* Minimum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "max_value" REAL /* Maximum allowed value for the parameter */,
  "validation_rule" TEXT /* Validation rule used to check the data */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_validation_well_id FOREIGN KEY ("well_id") REFERENCES wells ("well_id")
)
